hypothesis: A capped ExECT S0/S1 smoke on Qwen3.6:27b tests whether frozen v4.10 label-policy guidance produces valid multi-family JSON and scorer-compatible outputs before local model-suite scaling.
metric_caveats: This capped smoke run validates the ExECT S0/S1 field-family program contract on Qwen3.6:27b only; it is not a performance estimate.
These are partial ExECT S0/S1 diagnostics, not published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
Benchmark-facing fields are limited to audited diagnosis, seizure type, and annotated medication.
This config intentionally avoids ChainOfThought, BootstrapFewShot, and GEPA per docs/policies/qwen_dspy_latency_policy.md.
Uses configs/models/exect_qwen27b_ollama.json with raised-but-bounded max_tokens and num_ctx for long notes and structured outputs.
Do not compare this run to GPT 4.1-mini smoke or validation metrics as the same experiment.
Record local Ollama GPU residency or RAM offload when inspecting artifacts.
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
